wiki.summary: “P3T”, as much as it has a tune that you can vibe to, this song is about the dark and unsettling events of addiction, isolation and degradation. The lyrics paint a depressing picture of a trapped individual in a cycle of self-destruction and abuse. Read more on Last.fm.
